title: The plan is ready for your review. The key change from the failed attemp
description: The plan is ready for your review. The key change from the failed attempt: skip all Explore subagents and excessive codebase exploration — the test workflow is fully self-contained in the task definition. Proceeding will run the integration test steps (find PR → create conflict → trigger `@kody resolve` → verify → cleanup with `git revert`).
